---
title: "Class 19: Cancer Mutation Analysis"
author: "Saket Chodavarapu (PID: A18582086)"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(bio3d)

seqs <- read.fasta("A18582086_mutant_seq.fa")
head(seqs)
```

```{r}
diffs <- seqs$ali[1,] != seqs$ali[2,]

which(diffs)
seqs$ali[,diffs]
```

```{r}
healthy <- seqs$ali[1,]
mutant <- seqs$ali[2,]
```

```{r}
blast <- blast.pdb(healthy)
```

```{r}
head(blast)
```
